name: Green Beans in Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and cut them into three pieces.
2. Wash and drain the onions.
3. Place the onion and chopped tomatoes in a heavy pan.
4. Sprinkle with salt and rub in lightly with fingers.
5. Stir in the beans, olive oil, and sugar; mix well.
6. Cover and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. The beans will lose their color and soften.
8. When all the moisture has been absorbed, stir-fry the beans for 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Add half a cup of water, cover, and simmer for 40 to 50 minutes until tender.
10. Add more water if necessary, about half a cup at a time.
11. The dish should be very moist but not watery when cooked.
12. Serve cold as part of a buffet.
